## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Apr 24, 2026 - Jun 13, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _rwnenenenenenenen_, Jun 13, 2026, 2/5: "i love this app i use it all the time. ive been using it for 3 years now but it is SOOO glitchy. when i do a certain amount of hours and i pause it for like 3 minutes, it randomly just removes all the previous time i spent studying so i lose my prpgress. do better!!"
            2. _T R C VLOGZ_, Apr 24, 2026, 3/5: "Was a good app for months, but gone buggy af recently, eg I’d start a timer, leave my phone off, get the notification that my tree has grown and go back on, the timer still where it was / up to 5 mins after where I left it! Then today I can’t even start a session! Real pain cos it was such a good app!"
            3. _Idhdjebwbqh_, Apr 28, 2026, 4/5: "Love the app so much, it’s super motivating. However there are a few bugs I noticed: 1. Sometimes when I pledge a price and pause the focus (and come back), when the session is finished the app tells me I need to pay the price even though the tree never died. 2. Sometimes my focus sessions don’t record properly, e.g. if I set a 2 hour session, pause for 5 minutes and come back, the entire session will only be recorded as 10 mins long (make it make sense…) 3. Sometimes the app lies to me and tells me I have more bits than I actually have, I only realise when I try and buy a plant and it doesn’t allow me to buy it due to “insufficient bits”."
